summary: Comprehensive testing of PWA implementation, mobile responsiveness, membership card with QR code, modal overlay behavior, and authentication flows. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: PWA manifest.json is accessible and valid
Service worker file is accessible
PWA icons are accessible (72x72, 96x96, 192x192, 512x512, apple-touch-icon)
HTML has correct PWA meta tags (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable)
Service worker registration works in browser
Login page loads correctly
Member login flow works correctly (7777777777/PWAtest123!)
Admin login flow works correctly (9999999999/admin123)
Invalid login shows error toast
Registration page loads and form is functional
Password validation works on registration
Member dashboard loads with member data
Membership card displays correctly with BITZ Club branding
QR code renders on membership card (react-qr-code SVG)
Download card button is present and functional
Membership validity section displays correctly
Profile details show member information
Logout button works correctly
Partner benefits section loads
Homepage loads correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Landing page /landing works on mobile
Landing page enquiry form works on mobile
Login page is usable on mobile
Member dashboard is responsive on mobile
Membership card displays correctly on mobile viewport
Register page works on mobile
Homepage contact section is accessible on mobile
Homepage plans section displays on mobile
Admin login with no overlay issues
Member dashboard has no stuck overlay elements
Toast notifications appear and can be dismissed
Invalid login toast appears without blocking UI
Page navigation does not leave stale overlays
seed_data_creation: Used existing test member (7777777777/PWAtest123!) and admin (9999999999/admin123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PWA features (manifest, service worker, icons, meta tags) are working. Membership card with QR code displays correctly on both desktop and mobile. Dialog/modal overlay issue appears fixed - no stuck overlays found. Auth flows work for both member and admin. Mobile responsiveness tested across all key pages.
mocked_services_note: Razorpay payments, SendGrid email, and Twilio SMS are MOCKED - they log to console instead of sending real requests
